raw.subject: Your Mount Zion page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

Your post about dealing with spam calls really stood out. But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for potential clients to book appointments directly. I sketched a page idea that includes grooming services, a photo gallery from your posts, and a clear call to action for booking.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/fly-n-fur-grooming-mount-zion

I'd be happy to discuss how a simple website can help you manage bookings and grow your business - and it's a flat fee for local businesses like yours. Let's touch base soon to see if it's a good fit.
